content:
First unveiled at CES 2025 over a year ago, MOFT’s beloved MagSafe wallet with kickstand now comes with a much needed feature: Find My integration. After loads of delays, the product is now finally available for purchase.

Update 4/30: After debuting on their website back in February, MOFT’s Find My-integrated MagSafe wallet is now available on Amazon with prime delivery – at the same $49.99 price point, with all four colors: Jet Black, Misty Cove, Blackberry, and Terracotta.

I’ve already dug into detail on MOFT’s classic MagSafe wallet with kickstand over on 9to5Toys, so I won’t rehash things here. In short though, it’s great for three key reasons:

  • Made of a fantastic feeling vegan leather, and remains low-profile
  • Comes with a kickstand, allowing you to prop up your phone – or use it as a grip
  • Fits up to three cards (depending on thickness, you may end up closer to two)

The new version with Find My holds up in every key regard. For the most part, it’s the same great MagSafe wallet you may already know and love, just with Find My support. The built in speaker reaches up to 70dB for when you lose your wallet and need to find it.

Also, unlike other Find My wallets on the market, this one doesn’t require a proprietary cable to re-charge. It supports wireless charging and MagSafe. This is part of the reason it was so appealing to me at CES last year.

According to MOFT, one full charge will last up to 6 months. Despite having a battery and wireless charging coil inside, the new Find My version of the wallet still remains very low-profile.

You can buy the new Trackable Snap On wallet for $49.99 on Amazon or from MOFT directly. It comes in four sweet colors: Jet Black, Misty Cove, Blackberry, and Terracotta. The last one probably looks pretty good with an orange iPhone 17 Pro.

Check out exclusive free trials for Apple services:

  • Apple Music – $10.99/mo after free trial
  • Apple Arcade – $6.99/mo after free trial
  • Apple News+ – $12.99/mo after free trial
  • Apple TV+ – $12.99/mo after free trial
  • Apple One bundle – $19.95/mo after free trial
